title: Lipostoma campanuliflorum
taxonomy: Lipostoma campanuliflorum is classified within the family Gesneriaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet family. This classification places Lipostoma campanuliflorum among the monocots and further within the order Lamiales. Lipostoma campanuliflorum is native to South America, specifically in the tropical regions of the Andes. The exact classification of Lipostoma campanuliflorum can be further broken down at the genus and species levels. Lipostoma campanuliflorum is a relatively rare species within the Gesneriaceae family.
